• Help
SERFF Filing Access
You are currently operating in the state of Washington.
Begin Search

We are pleased to provide you an alternative method for viewing Rate and Form Filings electronically. If you wish, you may also submit a formal request by accessing this link https://www.insurance.wa.gov/public-disclosure-request-form to our public disclosure request form.
If you need assistance finding a filing or have public access questions, please contact our office directly at (360) 725-7111 and we will provide you with the assistance you need. We are available Monday through Friday from 8:00am to 5:00pm PST. If you are experiencing technical difficulties with the SERFF system or problems accessing the SERFF alternative access website, please direct your questions to the SERFF Help Desk at (816) 783-8990 or email sfahelp@naic.org. The SERFF Help Desk is staffed Monday through Friday from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. CST. If a customer support analyst is not available, please leave a message. SERFF staff will return your call or email the next business day.
SERFF Filing Access Help Desk
(816) 783-8500
sfahelp@naic.org
